footerTagline.zh: iPlayground 是從 2018 年開始專為蘋果軟體開發者設計的研討會，主題涵蓋 iOS 和 macOS 開發、Swift 和 Objective-C 、以及 app 軟體開發與 UI/UX 設計的經驗分享。這個活動由一群資深工程師創辦，目的是彌補台灣在 iOS 開發領域的研討會不足，並為開發者們提供更深入且多樣化的議程。
footerTagline.en: iPlayground is a conference designed for Apple software developers since 2018, covering iOS and macOS development, Swift and Objective-C, as well as app development and UI/UX design. Founded by a group of senior engineers to fill the gap in iOS-focused conferences in Taiwan.
